title: Democracy - Equality, Representation, Participation | Britannica
content: Democracy-Equality, Representation, Participation: Why should "the people" rule? Isdemocracyreally superior to any other form of government? Although a full exploration of this issue is beyond the scope of this article (see political philosophy), history—particularly 20th-century history— demonstrates thatdemocracyuniquely possesses a number of features that most people, whatever ...
